quick_skim.title: SCOPE Shrinkage: A Unified Framework for Wavelet Denoising
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Symmetric CDF Oriented Probability Enhanced (SCOPE) shrinkage, a unified family of sign-preserving shrinkage rules constructed from centered cumulative distribution functions of symmetric unimodal distributions. The proposed framework generates a broad class of attenuation profiles that interpolate between strong local shrinkage near zero and asymptotically unbiased behavior in the tails. A general formulation is developed that separates scale and shape effects through two interpretable parameters, allowing effective threshold location and transition sharpness to be controlled independently. Under explicit regularity assumptions, structural properties of SCOPE shrinkage are established, including oddness, monotonicity, continuity, contractivity, and a mixture representation that connects the rules to softened thresholding operators. A Bayesian and penalized likelihood interpretation is also developed: SCOPE rules admit even penalty representations that are nondecreasing in coefficient magnitude, and suitable subclasses arise as exact maximum a posteriori estimators under proper symmetric unimodal priors. Representative examples based on logistic, uniform, and Cauchy distributions illustrate how probabilistic shape governs shrinkage behavior. Data driven parameter selection for smooth subclasses is discussed via Stein-type unbiased risk estimation. Oracle calibrated simulation studies on standard Donoho-Johnstone test functions show that SCOPE shrinkage performs competitively with several established wavelet denoising methods, while retaining a high degree of interpretability and structural flexibility. The results highlight centered distribution functions as a natural and versatile design principle for shrinkage in wavelet denoising and related estimation problems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: wavelet denoising framework applicable to hyperspectral image denoising
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 小波去噪框架可应用于高光谱图像去噪
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 小波去噪框架可应用于高光谱图像去噪
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 小波去噪框架可应用于高光谱图像去噪
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SCOPE shrinkage, a unified family of wavelet denoising rules with interpretable parameters, offering a general-purpose denoising method that can be adapted for hyperspectral image denoising.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出SCOPE收缩，一种基于对称累积分布函数的小波去噪统一框架，通过两个可解释参数独立控制阈值位置和过渡锐度，建立了一系列保号收缩规则。该方法在通用去噪任务中有效，其结构化的衰减轮廓可迁移至高光谱图像去噪，为高光谱噪声去除提供了一种灵活的理论工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出SCOPE收缩，一种基于对称累积分布函数的小波去噪统一框架，通过两个可解释参数独立控制阈值位置和过渡锐度，建立了一系列保号收缩规则。该方法在通用去噪任务中有效，其结构化的衰减轮廓可迁移至高光谱图像去噪，为高光谱噪声去除提供了一种灵活的理论工具。

quick_skim.title: Show the Signal, Hide the Noise: Spectral Forcing for Pixel-Space Diffusion
quick_skim.abstract: Pixel-space diffusion models are trained on full-bandwidth noisy images, yet the useful signal available to the denoiser is strongly frequency dependent. Under rectified-flow diffusion and natural-image power-law spectra, the per-band data-to-noise contour $k^{*}(t) = (1-t)^{-2/α}$ separates a signal-bearing low-frequency region from a noise-dominated high-frequency region at each time $t$. We show that this implicit coarse-to-fine structure is not merely descriptive: it induces a capacity-allocation problem. A standard pixel-space denoiser must discover the moving bandwidth boundary internally and can spend computation on frequency-time regions where the optimal prediction collapses to deterministic baselines rather than data-distribution modeling. To make this boundary explicit, we introduce Spectral Forcing, a parameter-free, time-conditional 2D-DCT low-pass operator applied to the noisy input before the patch embedder. Its cutoff expands monotonically with the diffusion time and becomes the identity at the data endpoint. Through controlled synthetic experiments, we identify the regime in which the operator is beneficial: coarse patch tokenization and data whose high-frequency content is predominantly noise rather than essential signal. On ImageNet-256 with JiT-700M/32, Spectral Forcing consistently improves both FID and Inception Score across different training epochs, demonstrating robust gains throughout training; at finer tokenization, the spectral forcing is still competitive. We further insert the unchanged operator into SenseNova-U1, a unified text-to-image model, where it improves DPG-Bench and GenEval, showing that the input-side spectral prior transfers beyond class-conditional generation. These results suggest a route to capacity-efficient pixel-space diffusion by showing the signal and hiding the noise.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: spectral forcing for diffusion denoisers, relates to deep neural network denoising
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 光谱强制用于扩散去噪器，与深度神经网络去噪相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 光谱强制用于扩散去噪器，与深度神经网络去噪相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 光谱强制用于扩散去噪器，与深度神经网络去噪相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Identifies a capacity-allocation problem in pixel-space diffusion and proposes spectral forcing to hand-frequency regions, improving efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文揭示像素空间扩散模型存在容量分配问题：标准去噪器需自行发现时变频带边界，并在噪声主导区域浪费计算。通过分析整流流扩散与自然图像功率谱，定义了数据-噪声等高线，并提出显式频率强制策略，引导去噪器专注信号区。该方法提升了扩散去噪器的效率，可迁移至高光谱图像去噪场景，减少不必要的计算开销。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文揭示像素空间扩散模型存在容量分配问题：标准去噪器需自行发现时变频带边界，并在噪声主导区域浪费计算。通过分析整流流扩散与自然图像功率谱，定义了数据-噪声等高线，并提出显式频率强制策略，引导去噪器专注信号区。该方法提升了扩散去噪器的效率，可迁移至高光谱图像去噪场景，减少不必要的计算开销。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: hyperspectral image denoising using deep neural networks

quick_skim.title: Flow Map Denoisers: Traversing the Distortion-Perception Plane for Inverse Problems
quick_skim.abstract: Image restoration faces a fundamental tradeoff: methods that minimize error produce blurry reconstructions, while those that maximize perceptual quality yield sharp but less faithful images. Existing approaches either commit to a single operating point on this distortion perception (DP) frontier or require paired-data supervision, auxiliary models, or hyperparameter tuning of the sampler to access different points. We show that flow map models, a recent extension of flow matching for few-step sampling that learns an average field, implicitly define a one-parameter family of denoisers that continuously spans the DP frontier. The lookahead parameter t acts as a control knob between the MMSE and perceptual regimes. For Gaussian targets, we prove that varying t exactly recovers the optimal DP frontier; for natural images, we observe similar behavior empirically. Within a Plug-and-Play solver, the same mechanism extends to general inverse problems, where it controls a tradeoff between perceptual alignment and data consistency. Despite the lack of exact optimality guarantees in this setting, a single trained flow map spans the DP tradeoff, matching or exceeding specialized baselines at both extremes. Extensive experiments on CelebA ($128\times 128$) and AFHQ ($256\times 256$) across several linear and nonlinear inverse tasks validate our findings.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: flow map denoisers for inverse problems, directly addresses denoising with a control knob for distortion-perception tradeoff
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 流映射去噪器处理逆问题中的去噪，提供失真-感知权衡控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 流映射去噪器处理逆问题中的去噪，提供失真-感知权衡控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 流映射去噪器处理逆问题中的去噪，提供失真-感知权衡控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Shows that flow map models define a one-parameter family of denoisers spanning the distortion-perception frontier.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文发现流映射模型隐式定义了一族单参数去噪器，连续覆盖失真-感知前沿。通过调节前瞻参数t，可在MMSE与感知最优之间平滑切换，无需额外训练或超参数调整。实验证明该方法可灵活适应不同去噪需求，为高光谱图像去噪中平衡精度与视觉效果提供了有效工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文发现流映射模型隐式定义了一族单参数去噪器，连续覆盖失真-感知前沿。通过调节前瞻参数t，可在MMSE与感知最优之间平滑切换，无需额外训练或超参数调整。实验证明该方法可灵活适应不同去噪需求，为高光谱图像去噪中平衡精度与视觉效果提供了有效工具。
